content:
# Global Markets — Standard Settlement Instructions DEUTDEFFEEQ is the default Beneficiary BIC and LEI 7LTWFZYICNSX8D621K86 applies to all accounts unless a different BIC is explicitly stated below. All settlements must reference the agreed trade confirmation number in field 70 of the SWIFT message. ## FX Spot Settlement

All CHF settlements require pre-notification 2 business days in advance via SWIFT MT599. Failure to pre-notify will result in settlement rejection by Credit Suisse or UBS operations teams. For USD settlements exceeding USD 50 million notional, an additional pre-advice via SWIFT MT199 must be sent to CITIUS33 no later than 11:00 New York time on settlement date. SEK, NOK, and DKK settlements are subject to a T+2 standard settlement cycle in their respective local markets. Early settlement requests require written approval from the Treasury Desk.
